title: Overflow is allowed. Overflow is good.
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for normalising financial overflow as safe, calm, and deserved.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 42 of the MONEY program. For when a full account still triggers unease rather than calm.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 42 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Allow overflow to feel normal."

practice.whenToUse: Use on any morning when you want to anchor the felt sense that abundance is allowed to stay.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 42 of the MONEY program. The two-line structure does two jobs: permission, then evaluation. Allowed first, then good.
Overflow is allowed. Overflow is good. I am calm and grateful when money is plentiful.
Say it three times in the morning. On the third pass, let your shoulders drop and picture your account number: not needing to grow further, just allowed to be what it is.
Adapted from Day 42 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
